title: We get 36 color options for status column, but for creating groups (name of group) there are limited color options
excerpt:
I want to create group for each value in one of the status column. 
Want to use same color as of ‘Status’ value for the group. 
However group name has less color options than status values. Please make it consistent.

posts.author: MACMonday (Meena Barve)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to create group for each value in one of the status column.
Want to use same color as of ‘Status’ value for the group.
However group name has less color options than status values. Please make it consistent.

posts.author: pedro.diaz (Pedro Diaz Jr.)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree. But why stop there? It would be amazing to have custom color selection available for any and all areas that have color selection. Thoughts?
